    -- Prove that 2*H₂² + 5*H₂*H₄ + 5*H₄² is holomorphic
    have h₃ : MDifferentiable 𝘈(ℂ) 𝘈(ℂ) H₂ := by sorry
    have h₄ : MDifferentiable 𝘈(ℂ) 𝘈(ℂ) H₄ := by sorry
    have h₅ : MDifferentiable 𝘈(ℂ) 𝘈(ℂ) (fun x : ℂ => 2 * H₂ x ^ 2) := by
      -- 2 * H₂² is holomorphic
      have h₅₁ : MDifferentiable 𝘈(ℂ) 𝘈(ℂ) (fun x : ℂ => H₂ x ^ 2) := by
        apply MDifferentiable.pow
        exact h₃
      have h₅₂ : MDifferentiable 𝘈(ℂ) 𝘈(ℂ) (fun x : ℂ => (2 : ℂ) • H₂ x ^ 2) := by
        apply h₅₁.const_smul
      convert h₅₂ using 1 <;> simp [two_smul]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> field_simp
      <;> ring_nf
    have h₆ : MDifferentiable 𝘈(ℂ) 𝘈(ℂ) (fun x : ℂ => 5 * H₂ x * H₄ x) := by
      -- 5 * H₂ * H₄ is holomorphic
      have h₆₁ : MDifferentiable 𝘈(ℂ) 𝘈(ℂ) (fun x : ℂ => H₂ x * H₄ x) := by
        apply MDifferentiable.mul h₃ h₄
      have h₆₂ : MDifferentiable 𝘈(ℂ) 𝘈(ℂ) (fun x : ℂ => (5 : ℂ) • (H₂ x * H₄ x)) := by
        apply h₆₁.const_smul
      convert h₆₂ using 1 <;> simp [two_smul]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> field_simp
      <;> ring_nf
    have h₇ : MDifferentiable 𝘈(ℂ) 𝘈(ℂ) (fun x : ℂ => 5 * H₄ x ^ 2) := by
      -- 5 * H₄² is holomorphic
      have h₇₁ : MDifferentiable 𝘈(ℂ) 𝘈(ℂ) (fun x : ℂ => H₄ x ^ 2) := by
        apply MDifferentiable.pow
        exact h₄
      have h₇₂ : MDifferentiable 𝘈(ℂ) 𝘈(ℂ) (fun x : ℂ => (5 : ℂ) • H₄ x ^ 2) := by
        apply h₇₁.const_smul
      convert h₇₂ using 1 <;> simp [two_smul]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> field_simp
      <;> ring_nf
    -- Sum of holomorphic functions is holomorphic
    have h₈ : MDifferentiable 𝘈(ℂ) 𝘈(ℂ) (fun x : ℂ => 2 * H₂ x ^ 2 + 5 * H₂ x * H₄ x) := by
      apply h₅.add h₆
    have h₉ : MDifferentiable 𝘈(ℂ) 𝘈(ℂ) (fun x : ℂ => 2 * H₂ x ^ 2 + 5 * H₂ x * H₄ x + 5 * H₄ x ^ 2) := by
      apply h₈.add h₇
    exact h₉
  
  -- Product of holomorphic functions is holomorphic
  have h₃ : MDifferentiable 𝘈(ℂ) 𝘈(ℂ) (fun x : ℂ => H₂ x ^ 3 * (2 * H₂ x ^ 2 + 5 * H₂ x * H₄ x + 5 * H₄ x ^ 2)) := by
    apply h₁.mul h₂
  
  -- G is exactly the above function
  have h₄ : G = (fun x : ℂ => H₂ x ^ 3 * (2 * H₂ x ^ 2 + 5 * H₂ x * H₄ x + 5 * H₄ x ^ 2)) := by
    funext x
    rfl
  
  rw [h₄]
  exact h₃

have h₁ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (H₂ ^ 3 * (2 * H₂ ^ 2 + 5 * H₂ * H₄ + 5 * H₄ ^ 2)) := by
    have h₂ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (H₂ : ℂ → ℂ) := by
      apply ModularForm.holomorphic
      <;> exact ⟨by simp [H₂], by simp [H₂]⟩
    
    have h₃ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (H₄ : ℂ → ℂ) := by
      apply ModularForm.holomorphic
      <;> exact ⟨by simp [H₄], by simp [H₄]⟩
    
    have h₄ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (2 * H₂ ^ 2 + 5 * H₂ * H₄ + 5 * H₄ ^ 2 : ℂ → ℂ) := by
      have h₅ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (2 * H₂ ^ 2 : ℂ → ℂ) := by
        have h₅₁ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (H₂ : ℂ → ℂ) := h₂
        have h₅₂ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (H₂ ^ 2 : ℂ → ℂ) := by
          apply Differentiable.differentiableAt.differentiableWithinAt
          exact Differentiable.pow h₅₁.differentiable 2
        -- Multiply by the constant 2
        have h₅₃ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (2 : ℂ → ℂ) := by
          apply differentiable_const
        have h₅₄ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (2 * H₂ ^ 2 : ℂ → ℂ) := by
          apply MDifferentiable.mul h₅₃ h₅₂
        exact h₅₄
      have h₆ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (5 * H₂ * H₄ : ℂ → ℂ) := by
        have h₆₁ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (H₂ : ℂ → ℂ) := h₂
        have h₆₂ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (H₄ : ℂ → ℂ) := h₃
        have h₆₃ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (5 : ℂ → ℂ) := by
          apply differentiable_const
        have h₆₄ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (5 * H₂ : ℂ → ℂ) := by
          apply MDifferentiable.mul h₆₃ h₆₁
        have h₆₅ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (5 * H₂ * H₄ : ℂ → ℂ) := by
          apply MDifferentiable.mul h₆₄ h₆₂
        exact h₆₅
      have h₇ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (5 * H₄ ^ 2 : ℂ → ℂ) := by
        have h₇₁ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (H₄ : ℂ → ℂ) := h₃
        have h₇₂ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (H₄ ^ 2 : ℂ → ℂ) := by
          apply Differentiable.differentiableAt.differentiableWithinAt
          exact Differentiable.pow h₇₁.differentiable 2
        -- Multiply by the constant 5
        have h₇₃ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (5 : ℂ → ℂ) := by
          apply differentiable_const
        have h₇₄ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (5 * H₄ ^ 2 : ℂ → ℂ) := by
          apply MDifferentiable.mul h₇₃ h₇₂
        exact h₇₄
      -- Sum of the three terms
      have h₈ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (2 * H₂ ^ 2 + 5 * H₂ * H₄ + 5 * H₄ ^ 2 : ℂ → ℂ) := by
        have h₈₁ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (2 * H₂ ^ 2 + 5 * H₂ * H₄ : ℂ → ℂ) := by
          apply MDifferentiable.add h₅ h₆
        have h₈₂ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (2 * H₂ ^ 2 + 5 * H₂ * H₄ + 5 * H₄ ^ 2 : ℂ → ℂ) := by
          apply MDifferentiable.add h₈₁ h₇
        exact h₈₂
      exact h₈
    
    have h₅ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (H₂ ^ 3 : ℂ → ℂ) := by
      have h₅₁ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (H₂ : ℂ → ℂ) := h₂
      have h₅₂ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (H₂ ^ 3 : ℂ → ℂ) := by
        -- Use the fact that the cube of a holomorphic function is holomorphic
        have h₅₃ : Differentiable 𝂂 (H₂ : ℂ → ℂ) := h₅₁.differentiable
        have h₅₄ : Differentiable 𝂂 (H₂ ^ 3 : ℂ → ℂ) := by
          -- Use the fact that the power of a differentiable function is differentiable
          apply Differentiable.pow
          exact h₅₃
        -- Use the differentiability to conclude that it is holomorphic
        exact h₅₄.differentiableWithinAt
      exact h₅₂
    
    have h₆ : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (H₂ ^ 3 * (2 * H₂ ^ 2 + 5 * H₂ * H₄ + 5 * H₄ ^ 2) : ℂ → ℂ) := by
      apply MDifferentiable.mul h₅ h₄
    
    exact h₆
  
  have h₂ : G = (H₂ ^ 3 * (2 * H₂ ^ 2 + 5 * H₂ * H₄ + 5 * H₄ ^ 2)) := by
    rfl
  
  rw [h₂]
  exact h₁
